summary: Open-source framework for app-native AI agents and generative UI.
editor_note: Most agent products still end at a chat box; the sharper bet is giving agents a front end. CopilotKit exposes React and Angular SDKs, AG-UI, MCP Apps, threads, GitHub-backed docs, and a one-command npx path. Unlike Vercel's AI SDK or ChatGPT Apps, it is trying to be the neutral UI layer enterprises can self-host. The risk is that protocol gravity is hard to keep once platform vendors bundle the same primitives.

product_evidence.claim: Official product positioning describes CopilotKit: Open-source framework for app-native AI agents and generative UI.
CopilotKit exposes React and Angular SDKs, AG-UI, MCP Apps, threads, GitHub-backed docs, and a one-command npx path.
